sections.paragraph:
Original: טרף

Transliteration: ṭâraph

Phonetic: taw-raf'

BDB Definition:

  1. to tear, rend, pluck
    1. (Qal) to tear, rend
    2. (Niphal) to be torn in pieces
    3. (Poal) to be torn in pieces
    4. (Hiphil) to provide food

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 827

Part(s) of speech: Verb
